text.source_text: ब्रह्म जिज्ञासितव्यमित्युक्तम् । किंलक्षणकं पुनस्तद्ब्रह्मे त्यत आह भगवान्सूत्रकारः —
text.transliteration_iast: brahma jijñāsitavyamityuktam | kiṃlakṣaṇakaṃ punastadbrahme tyata āha bhagavānsūtrakāraḥ —

translation.literal_translation: It has been said that Brahman is to be inquired into. But what is the defining mark of that Brahman? Therefore the revered sutrakara says -
translation.technical_translation: Transition introducing the lakshana-sutra for Brahman.
translation.interpretive_note: Sets up formal definition after programmatic call to inquiry.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S01 pass with stable inferential-tag schema.
A later philological pass should revisit janmadi-lakshana and sastra-yonitva technical compression in records 1.1.008-1.1.015.
